scripts.dev:backend: pnpm cls && cd backend && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm cls && cd frontend && pnpm run dev
scripts.setup: pnpm run setup:backend && pnpm run setup:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.db:generate: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma generate
scripts.db:studio: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma studio
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && pnpm exec prisma migrate reset
scripts.test:performance:full: echo '🧪 Executando teste completo de performance...' && pnpm run test:performance
scripts.test:full: pnpm test:performance && pnpm test:phase5 && pnpm test:analytics && pnpm test:endpoints && pnpm test:database
scripts.clear:pedidos: cd backend && pnpm exec tsx scripts/clear-orders.ts
